instrument_family: Greek yoke lyre / chelys-inspired string instrument
design_goal: Historically informed original lyre with top-down SolidWorks family workflow and ergonomic modernizations
primary_materials: spruce; walnut or cherry; maple or mulberry; dark bridge hardwood; gut or Nylgut
primary_constraints: Do not clone LUTHIEROS; keep dimensions parametric; support future string-count and body-size variants; preserve ancient silhouette
notes: Use global variables, equations, and a design-table import path.
